zh.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Blackburne於大約1270年出生在英國藍卡爾維斯維爾時，她的父親Sir John Blakeburn22歲，母親Margaret de Holand20歲。她與Sir Robert Sherborn結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1351年之後。

zh-hans.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Blackburne于大约1270年出生在英国藍卡爾維斯維爾时，她的父亲Sir John Blakeburn22岁，母亲Margaret de Holand20岁。她与Sir Robert Sherborn结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1351年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Blackburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Blackburn
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Blackburn, but especially the one in Lancashire, so named with Old English blæc ‘dark’ + burna ‘stream’. This surname is found mainly in northern England.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Blackburne was born about 1270, in Wiswell, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir John Blakeburn, was 22 and her mother, Margaret de Holand, was 20. She married Sir Robert Sherborn. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1351.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Blackburne est née environ 1270, à Wiswell, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Blakeburn, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Holand, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Sherborn. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1351.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Blackburne um 1270 in Wiswell, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Blakeburn 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Holand 20. Sie hat Sir Robert Sherborn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1351.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Blackburne è nata il circa 1270 nel Wiswell, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir John Blakeburn, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Holand, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Sherborn. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1351.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Blackburneが約1270年にイギリスランカシュアイアウィスウエルで生まれた時，父Sir John Blakeburnは22歳，母Margaret de Holandは20歳であった。Sir Robert Sherbornと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1351年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Blackburne(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 랭카실르 와이스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Blakeburn(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Holand(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Sherborn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1351년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Blackburne nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Wiswell, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Blakeburn, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Holand, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Sherborn. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1351.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Blackburne родилась около 1270 г. в местности висвелл, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Blakeburn было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Holand, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Sherborn. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1351 г.

sm.about 1270–after 1351: e tusa o le 1270–ina ua ma'ea le 1351

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Blackburne nació aproximadamente 1270, en Wiswell, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Blakeburn, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret de Holand, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Sherborn. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1351.
